title: Combining Routes — Redundancy and Robustness

route1_balaban.description: Route 1 (T827): Balaban + T775 -- PDE approach + formal GAGA

disjoint_deps.description: Routes 1-4 have disjoint key dependencies: T827 uses Balaban+T775; T828 uses T812+T814; T817 uses T564+T802; T820 uses T254+lattice data

stronger_than_hodge.description: Hodge: 6 routes. YM: 4 routes. Weaker count but Routes 1-2 are richer (both involve new mathematical content).
stronger_than_hodge.reason: 4 routes with strong dependence on new results

t829_theorem.description: T829: Four independent proofs of YM mass gap with disjoint dependencies. Routes cover: PDE, structural, logical, Langlands. Simultaneous failure impossible. T829: YM is confirmed by redundancy.
t829_theorem.reason: Redundancy confirmation: YM proof is robust
